title: Hybrid single backend — host picks Base vs SaaS mode
description:
One PM2 process on port 3000 now serves both pipeshare.live (Base) and pipeshare.net + tenant subdomains (SaaS). resolveDeploymentProfile derives mode from the Host header; portal-files uses per-request Wasabi bucket selection.

Set HP_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=hybrid on OVH. nginx routes all hostnames to :3000. Publish from pipeshare.live cPanel; Apply from pipeshare.net cPanel.

Who is affected: OVH operators; no tenant data migration required.
changeLog: portal-files per-request Wasabi via AsyncLocalStorage + portalS3().
Platform release Publish/Apply gated by request host on hybrid.
nginx tenant + net hosts back to single :3000 upstream.
Fix login handler duplicate requestHost (startup crash on hybrid).
